title: mirabilis himalaica
intro: Mirabilis himalaica, a perennial plant species native to the Himalayan region, is also known as Himalayan toad, and its scientific name has been recently changed from Duttaphrynus himalayensis to Ascaphus himalayensis; however, the name Mirabilis himalaica is still used in some places. The medicinal properties of Mirabilis himalaica include its use as a diuretic, expectorant, and anti-inflammatory agent, as well as its potential to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mirabilis himalaica include its ability to help with urinary tract problems, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and powder, can be used to harness the medicinal properties of Mirabilis himalaica, but it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
